name: API Search
description: Generic REST API job search. Supports keyword-search APIs (JobTech, Adzuna) and feed APIs (RemoteOK, Remotive) via provider configs. Adding a new job board = adding JSON config, not code.

options.name: keywords
options.label: Search keywords
options.description: Search mode: one API call per keyword. Feed mode: client-side filter on title/description.

options.name: exclude_keywords
options.label: Exclude keywords
options.description: Items whose title contains these terms (case-insensitive) are filtered out.

options.name: max_results
options.label: Max results per keyword
options.description: Search mode: passed to API. Feed mode: max items after filtering.

options.name: active_providers
options.label: Active providers
options.description: Which provider IDs to use. Built-in: jobtech, remoteok, remotive.

options.name: custom_providers
options.label: Custom providers
options.description: Array of custom provider config objects. See README for schema.

options.name: provider_params
options.label: Provider parameters
options.description: Extra query params per provider. E.g. {"jobtech": {"municipality": "0180"}}

options.name: requests_per_minute
options.label: Rate limit (requests/min)
options.description: Global rate limit across all providers.
